_publications._publicationTitle: Structural and functional analyses of a germline KRAS T50I mutation provide insights into Raf activation.

_contextSnippet: Expressing EGFP–K-Ras G12D at endogenous levels enhanced the survival of MOLM-13 clone 24 cells upon AC220 treatment, as indicated by a reduction in the percentage of cells positive for cleaved caspase-3
details: Expressing EGFP–K-Ras G12D at endogenous levels enhanced survival upon AC220 treatment, reducing cleaved caspase-3 positive cells
